svg.text:
┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ FINE-TUNING STRATEGIES COMPARISON │ └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
STRATEGY 1: Feature Extraction STRATEGY 2: Full Fine-Tuning ─────────────────────────── ───────────────────────────── ┌─────────────────┐ ┌─────────────────┐ │ Conv Layers │ ❄️ Frozen │ Conv Layers │ 🔥 Trainable │ │ │ (low LR) │ ├─────────────────┤ ├─────────────────┤ │ Classifier │ 🔥 Trainable │ Classifier │ 🔥 Trainable │ (new head) │ │ (high LR) │ └─────────────────┘ └─────────────────┘
Best for: Very small datasets Best for: Large datasets Very different domain Similar domain
STRATEGY 3: Gradual Unfreezing STRATEGY 4: Discriminative LR ────────────────────────────── ──────────────────────────── Phase 1: Train head only Different LR per layer: Phase 2: Unfreeze layer4 Phase 3: Unfreeze layer3 Layer 1: 1e-6 (barely change) ... Layer 2: 1e-5 Layer 3: 1e-4 Layer 4: 1e-3 Head: 1e-2 (change most)
